Faults.message:
We're sorry about the power cut in the area, we know that you were without power for a very long time recently. The power cut is affecting some properties in the area shown on the map, but not all. This is why you may notice some of your neighbours have power, but you don't. It is normal to see 1 in 3 homes affected. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on PowerTrack.

Our first response engineer confirmed that the Court Hill substation and linkbox outside The White Swan Pub are both healthy. We’re sending our specialist engineer Matt and his team to locate the fault on our underground cable. We may need to dig and repair this today to get your power back on if we can’t find a quicker solution. Either way, we will get your power back on as quickly as possible. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 21:00 08/04/2026.

The cause of this power cut is a fault on our underground network. This is the most common type of fault we see, and our teams are very experienced in dealing with these issues.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY7929'

Faults.name: HP15 Area

Faults.message:
We're sorry about the continued power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting some properties in the area shown on the map, but not all. This is why you may notice some of your neighbours have power, but you don't. It is normal to see 1 in 3 homes affected. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on PowerTrack.

Our first response engineer tried replacing fuses at the Leigh Street substation, but this unfortunately was not successful. We are waiting for further specialist engineers to become available. It is busier than usual just now, but we'll be sending our engineers to the area as soon as possible. When they're on their way, we'll let you know what time they'll be arriving. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by21:00 08/04/2026.

The cause of this power cut is a fault on our network. This is the most common type of fault we see, and our teams are very experienced in dealing with these issues. In most cases, our engineers are able to get your power back on by simply replacing a fuse at the local substation, however, if the fault is severe, this may take us longer to fix. If this does happen, we will let you know.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY8052'

Our engineers need to replace a pole mounted transformer to restore power supplies but we may look at getting a generator if that doesn't go to plan. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 00:30 09/04/2026. If this changes, we'll let you know.


If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY8303'

Our engineers will complete this work as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on Power Track. All affected customers received a letter and a text reminder about this. If you have a power cut but didn't get a letter, please call us on105 or send us a message on Facebook or Twitter@ssencommunity)with reference '249813'.
